reviews.comment:
Mala atención de los empleados, no permitieron el acceso a los baños y trataron mal a un cliente.no tenían agua caliente. Desastre! Vayan a la Ypf norte que funciona joya!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the employees; they wouldn't let us use the restrooms and treated a customer badly. There was no hot water. A disaster! Go to the YPF station north; it's fantastic!
